section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

section.name: Maven Repository
section.p: Add the Bloomreach public and Forge repositories if your project does not already inherit them.

section.name: Dependency Management
section.p: Declare the CMS and site artifacts once in the root dependencyManagement section.

section.name: CMS Runtime
section.p: Add brxm-discovery-cms to the CMS runtime module that feeds your cms.war.
This artifact provides the picker runtime, node types, and bootstrap content.

tr.td: brxdis namespace and the brxdis:discoveryConfig node type.
Discovery daemon module, editor extensions, and default content definitions.
Generic Discovery resource spaces for search, pathways, and autosuggest.

section.name: Site Webapp
section.p: Add brxm-discovery-site to the site webapp WAR. This is the site runtime entry point.

tr.td: HST-facing facade for config lookup, caching, and API access.
CRISP-backed request builder for search, browse, autosuggest, and recommendations.
JVM-lifetime config cache invalidated by JCR observation.

section.name: Site/Components module
section.p: If your project has a separate site/components module, add brxm-discovery-site there as well so custom Java compiles against the same addon APIs, component classes, and DiscoveryChannelInfo interface as the runtime.

ol.li: Set crisp.broker.registerService=true in the site webapp hst-config.properties.
Provide Discovery credentials through env vars, system properties, or the global config node.
Wire the Discovery HST components into your sitemap and page composition.

section.name: Verify
section.p: After startup, check for the expected log lines and a live picker endpoint.

div.source: brxm-discovery: registered picker endpoint at /discovery/picker brxm-discovery: Registered JCR observation listener on '/hippo:configuration'

section.p: Then open http://localhost:8080/cms/ws/discovery/picker/search. A JSON response confirms the CMS endpoint is active.

td.code: Required HST service is not available: org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.platform.HstDiscoveryService

tr.td: Reinstall the addon snapshot locally, rebuild the host project, and redeploy the site webapp.
Rebuild and redeploy the site webapp so the current CRISP resolver assembly is loaded.

div.source:
cd /path/to/brxm-discovery mvn -DskipTests install
cd /path/to/your-project mvn clean install
